domains.name: Salesforce CRM
domains.description: Accounts, opportunities, and pipeline sourced from the Salesforce org. Answers questions about ARR, open pipeline, win rates, and account health.
example_questions: What is total open pipeline by region for this quarter?
Which AMER accounts have ARR above 500k and an open renewal?
What is our weighted pipeline for the EMEA enterprise segment?
domains.natural_language_guidance: Ask about pipeline, ARR, win rates, and account health. Examples: 'What is total open pipeline by region this quarter?', 'Which AMER accounts have ARR above 500k with an open renewal?', 'What is our weighted pipeline for the EMEA enterprise segment?'

disambiguation_hints.description: Required when a question names a specific account. Provide the Salesforce account ID; an ambiguous account name (e.g., 'Acme') triggers a clarification round that lists the matching accounts.
Defaults to the current fiscal quarter when a question omits a period.

domains.name: Sales Activity
domains.description: Rep activity, meetings logged, and engagement signals from the sales engagement platform.
example_questions: How many discovery calls did the AMER team log last week?
Which opportunities have had no activity in 30 days?
